task.en:
In the Documents folder there is a file named `wifi-card.txt`. Open it in TextEdit and read it: it gives a guest Wi-Fi network name and password. Then open the Stickies app and create a new sticky note (File menu, New Note) containing exactly these two lines, on separate lines:

Network: <the network name from the file>
Password: <the password from the file>

Replace the angle-bracket parts with the actual values from the file. Leave the note open so it is saved.

pre_command:
for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents"; printf 'Guest Wi-Fi card

Network name: Larkspur-Guest
Password: Tulip-Meadow-77

Share with visitors only.
' > "$HOME/Documents/wifi-card.txt"; killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; if grep -ql 'Larkspur-Guest' "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null || grep -ql 'Tulip-Meadow-77' "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null; then rm -rf "$d"; fi; done
grading_command: killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; found=0; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; txt=$(textutil -convert txt -stdout "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null); case "$txt" in *"Network: Larkspur-Guest"*) found=$((found+1));; esac; done; [ "$found" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False

killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; found=0; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; txt=$(textutil -convert txt -stdout "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null); case "$txt" in *"Password: Tulip-Meadow-77"*) found=$((found+1));; esac; done; [ "$found" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False
